zh.lifeSummary: Alice Advice of Outwell於1185年出生在英國諾福爾可武特維爾。她於1214年與Robert de la Lynde II在英國多瑟特文特爾布恩 可倫斯同結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1256年之後。

variants.name: Avis
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from the Middle English and Old French female personal name Avice, which may be from ancient Germanic Aveza, but more probably from Latin Avitia (also found in a masculine form, Avitius). In France, this surname is rare.
Portuguese and Spanish: habitational name from the little town of Avis (the stress is on the i) in Portalegre district (Portugal). This surname is found in the neighboring Spanish Extremadura.
Dutch: variant of Aafjes a metronymic from the female personal name Ave, which is of unclear origin.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Outwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire and Essex): variant of Boutell , with -ell reinterpreted as a casual pronunciation of -well.

variants.name: Boutell
meanings: English (Essex and Suffolk): nickname perhaps for a flour sifter, from Anglo-Norman boletel, buletel ‘sieve, bolting-cloth’ (Old French buletel, earlier buretel) ‘sieve’. In Middle English buletel was used to denote a kind of cloth especially prepared for sifting, and the name may have been given to a maker of this cloth or be a shortened form of Boulter .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Advice of Outwell was born in 1185, in Outwell, Norfolk, England. She married Robert de la Lynde II in 1214, in Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1256.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Advice of Outwellは1185年にイギリスノーフォルクオウトウエルで生まれた。1214年にイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン クレンストーンでRobert de la Lynde IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1256年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Advice of Outwell(은)는 1185년 영국 노르폴크 우트웰에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1214년 영국 도르세트 윈터보우른 클렌스톤에서 Robert de la Lynde II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1256년 이후 사망했다.
